---
title: "Sophia Stang" 
about:
  template: trestles  # jolla  trestles  solana  marquee  broadside
  image: img/New_pic.png 
  image-width: 16em
  image-shape: rounded # rectangle  round  rounded
  
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sophia-stang-829915286/
    - icon: instagram
      text: Instagram
      href: https://www.instagram.com/sjstang30/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://ssdanl.github.io/
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: Resumé
      href: Sophia_Stang_Resume_2026.pdf
      target: _blank
    - icon: mailbox
      text: Email
      href: mailto:sjstang30@gmail.com

---


Sophia Stang majors in Biology and minors in Data Analytics and the Honors Program at SUNY Geneseo. When not working on research and data analytics, Sophia enjoys spending time practicing the arts and reading.

## Education

State University of New York at Geneseo | Geneseo, NY <br>
B.S. in Biology | Aug 2022 - May 2026 <br>
Minor in Data Analytics and College Honors Program

## Experience

SUNY Geneseo CIT HelpDesk Technician and Manager (Aug 2023 - May 2026)| Coral Reef Disease Research Jan 2024 - May 2024 | Native Bee Ecology Directed Study (Aug 2024 - May 2026)
